prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built Pontiac 421 Super Duty (engine code: 421-S) with forged internals, including a forged crankshaft (Eagle 4340 steel crank, 4.25" stroke), forged aluminum pistons (JE 12.5:1 compression), and H-beam connecting rods (Eagle 6.800" length). Paired with a custom camshaft (Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H, 248°/254° duration, .585" lift) and ported/polished cylinder heads (Pontiac D-port, 2.11" intake/1.77" exhaust valves, Ferrea titanium retainers).

Forced induction via a custom-built twin-turbo system using Garrett GTX4202R turbos (88mm, .82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom air-to-water intercooler (PWR North America, 4.5" thick core) and a custom intake manifold (Edelbrock Victor Jr. base, modified for turbo mounting). Fuel system upgraded with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, Aeromotive A1000 regulator, and ID1700x injectors (2200cc/min).

Chassis reinforcement with a full Art Morrison Enterprises Max G chassis (subframe connectors, torque boxes, and a 4-link rear suspension with adjustable Panhard bar). Suspension upgraded with RideTech HQ Series coilovers (double adjustable, 250 lb/in front, 300 lb/in rear) and Baer 14" Extreme Plus 6P brake kit (6-piston calipers, 2-piece rotors, stainless steel lines).
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rare Drive Automotive 1964 GTO kit (hand-laid fiberglass, 3" wider front fenders, 4" wider rear quarters) with custom rolled rear wheel arches to fit 18x12" BBS LM wheels (ET -12 offset) wrapped in Mickey Thompson ET Street R tires (335/30R18).

Full custom paint job in PPG Vibrance Collection "Lime Gold" with a 3-stage pearl application, complemented by a custom blacked-out grille (replica of the 1965 GTO style) and LED headlights (Hella 500 Series, HID projector retrofit).

Interior overhaul with a full TMI Products custom upholstery kit (black Nappa leather with gold stitching), a custom roll cage (Chassisworks 8-point bolt-in, mild steel, 1.75" diameter), and a custom gauge cluster (Autometer Pro-Comp Ultra-Lite, 5" tachometer, boost/fuel pressure gauges, and oil temperature).
